changeLog: Settings panel restyle (segmented provider toggle, grouped cards, outline/filled buttons) plus two chat-window stability fixes. Crash fix 1: clicking the window during AI generation no longer triggers a Windows TDR/BSOD on affected GPU drivers — the dangerous InputTextMultiline + CallbackAlways + ReadOnly combo is no longer rendered in the busy branch (DrawList_AddText + Dummy preserve the visual slot). Crash fix 2: the EEL InputText capture callback is now ImGui_Attach'd to the ctx at creation, matching how fonts and images are owned; previously ReaImGui could GC it under streaming string pressure and the next InputTextMultiline call would dereference a stale pointer.
